_notes: Tool schemas in Claude API format. Each tool here must have a matching implementation in tools/*.py and be registered in agent/tools.py.

tools.name: get_pipeline_status
tools.description: Get the current status of all active clients in the pipeline. Use this to answer questions like 'what's going on?' or for heartbeat checks.

tools.name: get_client_info
tools.description: Get full details for a specific client by their ID or company name.

client_id.description: The client's UUID from the database

tools.name: create_client
tools.description: Create a new client in the pipeline. Call this when Justin introduces a new prospect or drops a transcript for someone not yet in the system.

tier.description: Product tier. Default to build_997 if not specified.

team_size.description: Number of people on the team

tools.name: update_client_stage
tools.description: Move a client to a new pipeline stage.

new_stage.description: The stage to move the client to

notes.description: Optional notes about why the stage is changing

tools.name: run_agent
tools.description: Trigger a specialist agent to run for a client. Use this to delegate work to your team.

flags.description: Optional flags to pass to the agent (e.g. '--pre-call', '--response', '--update build_complete')

tools.name: post_slack_message
tools.description: Post a message to a Slack channel. Use for ops updates, client channel milestones, and alerts.

thread_ts.description: Optional: reply in a thread by providing the parent message timestamp

tools.name: create_slack_channel
tools.description: Create a private Slack channel for a new client engagement.

company_name.description: Company name — used to generate the channel name (client-[slug])

tools.name: dm_user
tools.description: Send a direct message to a Slack user by their user ID. Use for morning/evening briefs or private alerts to Justin.

tools.name: get_current_time
tools.description: Get the current date and time in Eastern Time. Use when you need today's date, current hour, or day of week for briefs and scheduling decisions.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a local file by path and return its contents. Use for transcripts, notes, or config files Justin has dropped on the server.

file_path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a public URL and return its text content. Use to check a client's website before a call or pull public information.

tools.name: calculate_days_since
tools.description: Calculate how many days have passed since a given date. Use for checkpoint timing and upsell delay checks.

tools.name: get_upsell_signals
tools.description: Get pending upsell signals from the database that haven't been actioned yet. Use during heartbeats to check what needs follow-up.

actioned.description: If true, return already-actioned signals. Default false (pending only).

tools.name: log_upsell_action
tools.description: Mark an upsell signal as actioned after Justin has followed up. Prevents duplicate nudges.

signal_id.description: UUID of the signal in agent_upsell_log

action_taken.description: Description of what was done (e.g. 'Pitched Training Contracts on call')

tools.name: search_entity
tools.description: Search for a client or entity by name across the database. Use when Justin references someone by name and you need their ID.

search_term.description: Name or company text to search for

tools.name: get_campaign_pipeline
tools.description: Get all active campaigns grouped by stage with counts. Use to see the full GTM pipeline.

tools.name: create_campaign
tools.description: Create a new campaign in the GTM pipeline.

tier.description: Channel type: cold_email, linkedin, phone, social_sdr, partner, content, youtube

tools.name: update_campaign_stage
tools.description: Move a campaign to a new pipeline stage.

new_stage.description: Target stage: draft, queued, running, paused, replied, converted, closed

tools.name: get_cold_email_stats
tools.description: Pull live stats from the cold email VPS dashboard (SmartLead data: sent, replies, bounces).

tools.name: get_gtm_overview
tools.description: Get a unified overview of all GTM channels — campaigns by channel, email stats, recent agent activity.

tools.name: log_campaign_action
tools.description: Log an action taken on a campaign (appears in the operations activity feed).
